query: WITH sizes AS ( SELECT relname::TEXT AS table_name, pg_relation_size(relid)::BIGINT AS table_bytes, pg_indexes_size(relid)::BIGINT AS index_bytes, (pg_total_relation_size(relid) - pg_relation_size(relid) - pg_indexes_size(relid))::BIGINT AS toast_bytes, pg_total_relation_size(relid)::BIGINT AS total_bytes FROM pg_catalog.pg_statio_user_tables ) SELECT table_name AS "table_name!", table_bytes AS "table_bytes!", index_bytes AS "index_bytes!", toast_bytes AS "toast_bytes!", total_bytes AS "total_bytes!" FROM sizes ORDER BY total_bytes DESC, table_name ASC
